data.title: SES Shareholders Approve 2025 Accounts, Dividend and Board Changes at April 2 AGM
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

SES S.A. ( (FR:SESG) ) has provided an announcement.

On April 2, 2026, SES held its Annual General Meeting of shareholders in Betzdorf, Luxembourg, where investors approved all resolutions recommended by the board, including the 2025 annual accounts and a total annual dividend of EUR 0.50 per A-share and EUR 0.20 per B-share. The payout includes an interim dividend already distributed on October 16, 2025, and a final dividend scheduled for April 16, 2026, underscoring continued capital returns to shareholders.

Shareholders also backed governance measures, setting the board size at nine directors, re-electing Frank Esser and Anne-Catherine Ries, and appointing Joseph Cohen for a three-year term. The board re-elected Esser as chairperson and confirmed Ries and Peter van Bommel as vice-chairpersons for one year, reinforcing leadership continuity as SES advances its multi-orbit strategy and integration of Intelsat to drive verticalization and long-term value creation.

The most recent analyst rating on (FR:SESG) stock is a Hold with a EUR5.85 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on SES S.A. stock, see the FR:SESG Stock Forecast page.

More about SES S.A.

SES S.A., headquartered in Luxembourg and listed on the Paris and Luxembourg stock exchanges under the ticker SESG, operates in the satellite communications and space connectivity industry. The company provides integrated multi-orbit satellite and terrestrial network solutions, delivering resilient connectivity and high-quality video services to governments, businesses, and consumers worldwide, and has expanded its scale and capabilities through the acquisition of Intelsat.

Average Trading Volume: 584,842

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: €2.63B

For a thorough assessment of SESG stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: United Homes Group Amends Credit Facilities Amid Merger Plans
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

United Homes Group ( (UHG) ) has provided an update.

On March 31, 2026, United Homes Group, Inc. amended its Wells Fargo-led credit facility, securing temporary waivers of its debt service coverage and leverage ratio covenants until the earlier of May 31, 2026 or the occurrence of certain unrelated events of default. The amendment also obliges the company to fully refinance and repay this facility within 60 days if its pending merger with Stanley Martin Homes, LLC does not close by the outside date or is formally terminated.

On the same date, the company amended its Kennedy Lewis credit facility, waiving the debt service coverage and leverage ratio requirements for the period from January 1, 2026 through the fiscal quarter ending on or before March 31, 2026. That agreement likewise requires full refinancing and repayment within 60 days if the merger fails to close by the outside date, underscoring the extent to which United Homes Group’s capital structure and covenant relief are now closely tied to the completion of the Stanley Martin transaction.

The most recent analyst rating on (UHG) stock is a Sell with a $1.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on United Homes Group stock, see the UHG Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on UHG Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, UHG is a Neutral.

The score is driven primarily by weakened financial performance—2025 losses, negative free cash flow, and elevated leverage—raising near-term risk. Technicals add pressure due to a sustained downtrend (price below key moving averages and negative MACD), while valuation provides limited offset because the negative P/E reflects loss-making conditions and there is no dividend support.

To see Spark’s full report on UHG stock, click here.

More about United Homes Group

United Homes Group, Inc. is a homebuilding company operating through subsidiaries including Great Southern Homes, Inc. and Rosewood Communities, Inc., with a focus on residential development in its regional markets. The company utilizes multiple credit facilities with banking and institutional lenders to fund its construction, land acquisition, and broader corporate financing needs.

Average Trading Volume: 379,829

data.title: Village Farms Announces CFO Succession and M&A Focus
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Village Farms International ( (VFF) ) has shared an announcement.

On March 30, 2026, Village Farms International’s long-serving Chief Financial Officer, Stephen Ruffini, notified the company that he intends to transition out of the CFO role as part of a planned succession process. He will remain in the position until a new CFO is appointed, and the company said his departure from the finance role is not linked to any disputes or concerns over financial reporting, accounting, operations, or policies.

Announced publicly on April 3, 2026, the succession plan will see Village Farms commence an immediate search for a new CFO while retaining Ruffini in a new executive post focused on mergers and acquisitions. The move underscores the company’s strategy to pair organic growth with accretive global acquisitions, building on Ruffini’s 17-year tenure in which he helped transform Village Farms into a leading cannabis CPG operator, complete key financings, and execute strategic transactions that supported its expansion and shareholder value.

The most recent analyst rating on (VFF) stock is a Hold with a $2.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Village Farms International stock, see the VFF Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on VFF Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, VFF is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by weak cash flow conversion and contracting revenue (financial performance) and by soft technical momentum (below key moving averages with negative MACD). These are partially offset by a constructive earnings-call outlook highlighting record profitability, strong operational execution, and capacity-driven growth initiatives.

To see Spark’s full report on VFF stock, click here.

More about Village Farms International

Village Farms International, Inc. is a global leader in cannabis and plant-based consumer packaged goods, leveraging decades of Controlled Environment Agriculture expertise and Dutch farming practices. The company operates extensive greenhouse and indoor cultivation assets, with major cannabis operations in Canada, participation in the regulated cannabis program in the Netherlands, and a large U.S. hemp-derived wellness platform.

Its Canadian operations include one of the world’s largest EU-GMP certified cannabis facilities and a leading portfolio of dried-flower brands such as Pure Sunfarms Pink Kush. Beyond cannabis, Village Farms runs a Clean Energy division that converts landfill gas into renewable natural gas and holds an equity stake in Vanguard Food LP, which is pursuing strategic acquisitions to build a North American branded food platform.

Average Trading Volume: 1,169,044

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: $315.4M

data.title: Innate Pharma to Engage Investors at Kempen Life Sciences Conference in Amsterdam
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An update from Innate Pharma SA ( (FR:IPH) ) is now available.

Innate Pharma S.A., a clinical-stage biotechnology company specializing in cancer immunotherapies and next-generation antibody therapeutics, is advancing a pipeline that includes IPH4502 for solid tumors, lacutamab for T cell lymphomas, and monalizumab in non-small cell lung cancer through collaborations with partners such as AstraZeneca and Sanofi. The company, headquartered in Marseille with a U.S. base in Rockville, is listed on both Euronext Paris and Nasdaq, underscoring its global reach in immuno-oncology.

On April 3, 2026, Innate Pharma announced that its executive team will hold one-on-one investor meetings at the Kempen Life Sciences Conference in Amsterdam on April 15–16, 2026. This investor-focused engagement signals continued efforts to strengthen relationships with the financial community, potentially increasing visibility of its oncology pipeline and supporting access to capital in a competitive biotech funding environment.

The most recent analyst rating on (FR:IPH) stock is a Hold with a EUR1.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Innate Pharma SA stock, see the FR:IPH Stock Forecast page.

More about Innate Pharma SA

Innate Pharma S.A. is a global clinical-stage biotechnology company focused on developing immunotherapies for cancer patients. Leveraging antibody engineering and novel target identification, it is advancing a pipeline of next-generation antibody therapeutics, including Nectin-4 ADC IPH4502 for solid tumors, lacutamab for cutaneous and peripheral T cell lymphomas, and monalizumab, partnered with AstraZeneca, for non-small cell lung cancer.

The company operates through collaborations with major biopharmaceutical partners such as Sanofi and AstraZeneca, as well as academic institutions, to drive innovation in immuno-oncology. Headquartered in Marseille, France, with a U.S. office in Rockville, Maryland, Innate Pharma is dual-listed on Euronext Paris and Nasdaq under the tickers IPH and IPHA, respectively, reflecting its international capital markets footprint.

An announcement from Alta Equipment Group ( (ALTG) ) is now available.

On April 3, 2026, Alta Equipment Group Inc. announced that its board of directors approved a quarterly dividend of $625 per share on its 10% Series A Cumulative Perpetual Preferred Stock, equivalent to $0.625 per Depositary Share representing a 1/1000th interest in a preferred share. The dividend will be paid on April 30, 2026, to shareholders of record as of April 15, 2026, underscoring the company’s ongoing commitment to returning capital to preferred shareholders and maintaining its obligations on cumulative preferred securities.

Alta Equipment Group Inc. is a leading North American equipment dealership platform focused on premium material handling, construction and environmental processing equipment and related services. Through a network of more than 80 branches across multiple U.S. states and Canadian provinces, the company sells, rents, and services lift trucks, earthmoving machinery, crushing and screening systems, cranes and aerial work platforms, paving and asphalt equipment, and other specialized construction equipment.

Operating as an equipment dealership for 41 years, Alta positions itself as a one-stop shop for customers’ equipment needs, offering an extensive portfolio of industry-leading products and aftermarket support. Its broad geographic footprint and integrated service capabilities target industrial, construction and environmental customers that require both equipment access and ongoing parts and maintenance solutions.

On February 12, 2026, Health Catalyst, Inc. Chief Executive Officer and principal executive officer Daniel Burton accelerated the effective date of his previously announced retirement to that same day, marking an earlier‑than‑expected leadership transition at the healthcare data and analytics company. data.title: Atlantic International Challenges Creditor Default Claims in Court
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Atlantic International ( (ATLN) ) has shared an announcement.

On March 30, 2026, SPP Credit Advisors issued default notices to Atlantic International and its Lyneer subsidiaries under both an April 29, 2025 term loan agreement and a June 18, 2024 bridge loan, alleging breaches of financial and non-financial covenants. SPP reserved broad enforcement rights, attempted to exercise its collateral pledges and sought to replace Lyneer’s management, moves that Atlantic is contesting as baseless defaults designed to seize control of the Lyneer businesses.

Atlantic and the Lyneer subsidiaries responded on April 1, 2026 by filing suit in New York state court, seeking a temporary restraining order and preliminary injunction to block SPP from asserting management control, seizing assets or exercising loan remedies, arguing that SPP’s debt had been satisfied by over $77 million of Atlantic stock collateral and that its actions amount to a hostile takeover. The dispute has been further complicated by the March 30, 2026 resignation and for-cause termination of Chief Operating Officer Mathew Evelt, whom Atlantic accuses of egregious misconduct and of siding with SPP, raising governance concerns and legal uncertainty for lenders, shareholders and employees as the litigation proceeds.

The most recent analyst rating on (ATLN) stock is a Hold with a $3.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Atlantic International stock, see the ATLN Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on ATLN Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, ATLN is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by weak financial health—loss-making operations and a highly concerning balance sheet with negative equity—despite strong revenue growth. Technicals are supportive with strong upward momentum above major moving averages, and corporate events are positive (acquisition and new CFO), but valuation is constrained by negative earnings and no stated dividend yield.

To see Spark’s full report on ATLN stock, click here.

More about Atlantic International

Atlantic International Corp. operates through its Lyneer subsidiaries, including Lyneer Investments, Lyneer Holdings and Lyneer Staffing Solutions, which focus on staffing and workforce solutions. The group’s financing structure includes a term loan and a bridge loan provided by SPP Credit Advisors, secured in part by pledges over the ownership and governance rights of the Lyneer entities.

Average Trading Volume: 163,434

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: $219.8M

For a thorough assessment of ATLN stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.
